common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define.content: Create asynchronous task to batch add item

children.data: Create asynchronous task to batch add item

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: partner_id is invalid

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: The App is deleted, and you'll be unable to make any API call.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: App developer’s permissions for authorizations have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no partner_id in query.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Invalid timestamp

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no sign in query.

common_error_list.name: error_sign
common_error_list.description: Wrong sign.

common_error_list.name: invalid_partner_id
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission to current api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_call_restricted
common_error_list.description: The App permission for api call have been restricted. If you’re a seller, contact the developer for more information. If you’re the developer, refer to the Open Platform Console for details.

common_error_list.name: api_suspended
common_error_list.description: The API is offline. Please call v2 API instead.

common_error_list.name: error_limit
common_error_list.description: The total API call number made by your APP has reached the daily API call limit, please try again after 00: 00 (UTC+08:00)

common_error_list.name: error_rate_limit
common_error_list.description: Too many requests. You have reached the rate limit. Please try again later.

common_error_list.name: source_ip_undeclared
common_error_list.description: Request Source IP ({ip}) is undeclared. Please declare all your IP addresses in the Shopee Open Platform Console > App list > IP Address Whitelist

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Permission denied. This API is currently offline or the request path is incorrect.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Partner_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: no timestamp.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: Timestamp is expired.

common_error_list.name: error_partner_key_expired
common_error_list.description: Your API partner key has expired, please reset the Live API Partner Key in Console to get a new valid partner key to call open api.

common_error_list.name: error_api_permission
common_error_list.description: This app type has no permission to this API.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no access_token in query.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shopid.

common_error_list.name: shop_no_linked
common_error_list.description: Partner and shop has no linked.

common_error_list.name: shop_banned
common_error_list.description: The shop account has been banned. Permissions for shop authorization and API calls have been suspended until the shop account is restored.

common_error_list.name: invalid_acceess_token
common_error_list.description: Invalid access_token, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: partner_shop_no_link
common_error_list.description: Invalid partner_id or shop_id, please have a check.

common_error_list.name: error_ashop_api_permission
common_error_list.description: The shop is Affiliate shop has no permission to call this API.

common_error_list.name: error_kyc_auth
common_error_list.description: No permission. Please inform the seller to complete the Seller Registration on Shopee Seller Center first, then this shop can call for this API.

common_error_list.name: error_auth
common_error_list.description: System error, please try again later.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: There is no shop_id in query.

common_error_list.name: error_param
common_error_list.description: shop_id is invalid, should be an integer between 0 and 4294967295.

request_params.description: The item list to batch add. The list size must be between 1 and 100.
request_params.name: item_list

children.name: original_price
children.description: Item price

children.description: if description_type is normal , Description information should be set by this field.

children.name: weight
children.description: The weight of this item, the unit is KG.

children.name: item_name
children.description: Item name

children.name: item_status
children.description: Item status, could be UNLIST or NORMAL
The dimension of this item.

children.name: package_height
children.description: The height of package for this item, the unit is CM.

children.name: package_length
children.description: The length of package for this item, the unit is CM.

children.name: package_width
children.description: The width of package for this item, the unit is CM.

children.description: Logistic channel setting

children.name: size_id
children.description: Size ID, If specify logistic fee_type is SIZE_SELECTION size_id is required.

children.name: shipping_fee
children.description: Shipping fee, Only needed when logistics fee_type = CUSTOM_PRICE.

children.name: enabled
children.description: Whether channel is enabled for this item

children.name: logistic_id
children.description: ID of the channel

children.name: is_free
children.description: Whether cover shipping fee for buyer

children.name: logistic_info

children.description: This field is optional(expect Indonesia) depending on the specific attribute under different categories. Should call shopee.item.GetAttributes to get attribute first. Must contain all all mandatory attribute.

children.name: attribute_id
children.description: ID of attribute

children.name: value_id
children.description: Value ID. In the following cases, the value id needs to be uploaded as 0, and original_value_name is mandatory, needs to be filled in customized value. (1) AttributeInputType is TEXT_FILED; (2) AttributeInputType is COMBO_BOX or MULTIPLE_SELECT_COMBO_BOX, and the seller want to fill in a customized value.

children.name: original_value_name
children.description: Value name. original_value_name from product.get_attributes api. If value id=0, this field is required. If AttributeType is DATE_TYPE or TIMESTAMP_TYPE, you can upload timestamp(string type) as the original_value_name.

children.name: value_unit
children.description: Unit of attribute value (quantitative attribute only).

category_id

Item images

Ratio of image,

"1:1" (default) 
"3:4"

only applicable to whitelisted seller.

image
pre_order
is_pre_order

Pre order setting

children.description: SKU tag of item

children.name: condition

min_count

Wholesale setting

children.description: Video upload ID returned from video uploading API. Only accept one video_upload_id.

children.description: Id of brand.

children.name: original_brand_name
children.description: Original name of brand( No Brand if not brand).

children.name: item_dangerous
children.description: This field is only applicable for local sellers in Indonesia and Malaysia. Use this field to identify whether a product is a dangerous product. 0 for non-dangerous product and 1 for dangerous product. For more information, please visit the market's respective Seller Education Hub.

children.name: tax_info
ncm
children.description:
Mercosur Common Nomenclature, it is a convention between Mercosur member countries to easily recognize goods, services and productive factors negotiated among themselves. (BR region)


NCM must have 8 digits, OR, if your item doesn't have a NCM enter the value "00"

children.name: same_state_cfop
children.description: Tax Code of Operations and Installments for orders that seller and buyer are in the same state. It identifies a specific operation by category at the time of issuing the invoice.(BR region)

children.name: diff_state_cfop
children.description: Tax Code of Operations and Installments for orders that seller and buyer are in different states. It identifies a specific operation by category at the time of issuing the invoice.(BR region)

children.name: csosn
children.description: Code of Operation Status – Simples Nacional, code for company operations to identify the origin of the goods and the taxation regime of the operations.(BR region)

children.name: origin
children.description:
Product source, domestic or foreig (BR region).

|0 - National, except for those indicated in codes 3, 4, 5, and 8|
|1 - Foreign: Direct import, except for that indicated in code 6|
|2 - Foreign: Acquired in the domestic market, except for that indicated in code 7|
|3 - National: Goods or products with Import Content greater than 40% and less than or equal to 70%|
|4 - National: Produced in compliance with the basic production processes outlined in the legislations cited in the Agreements|
|5 - National: Goods or products with Import Content less than or equal to 40%|
|6 - Foreign: Direct import, without a national equivalent, listed by CAMEX and natural gas|
|7 - Foreign: Acquired in the domestic market, without a national equivalent, listed by CAMEX and natural gas|
|8 - National: Goods or products with Import Content greater than 70%|

children.name: cest
children.description:
Tax Replacement Specifying Code (CEST), to separate within the same NCM products that do or do not have ICMS tax substitution. (BR region)

CEST must have 7 digits, OR, if your item doesn't have a CEST enter the value "00".

children.name: measure_unit
children.description: (BR region)

tax_type only for TW whitelist shop. Shopee will referred Tax type when substitute sellers for issuing e-receipts to buyers. All variations share the same tax type. The meaning of value: 

0: no tax type

1: tax-able

2: tax-free
children.name: tax_type

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

PIS - Programa de Integração Social (Social Integration Program). It is a government tax to collect resources for the payment of unemployment insurance and other employee related rights.

PIS % - the tax applied to this product
children.name: pis

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

COFINS – Contribuição para Financiamento da Seguridade Social (Contribution for Social Security Funding). It is a government tax to collect resources for public health system and social security.

COFINS % - the tax applied to this product
children.name: cofins

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

ICMS - Imposto sobre Circulação de Mercadorias e Serviços (Circulation of Goods and Services Tax). 

CST - Código da Situação Tributária (Tax Situation Code) is represented by a combination of 3 numbers with the purpose of demonstrating the origin of a product and determining the form of taxation that will apply to it. Therefore, each digit in the CST Table has a specific meaning: the first digit indicates the origin of the operation, the second digit represents the ICMS taxation on the operation and the third digit provides additional information about the form of taxation.
children.name: icms_cst

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

The CST PIS/Cofins is a code on the Electronic Invoice (NF-e) that identifies the tax situation of PIS (Programa de Integração Social) and Cofins (Contribuição para o Financiamento da Seguridade Social) in sales of goods.
children.name: pis_cofins_cst

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

Enter the total percentage of the combination of federal, state, and municipal taxes, using up to two decimals.
children.name: federal_state_taxes

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

1: Retailer

2: Manufacturer
children.name: operation_type

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

The EXTIPI field in the NF-e (Nota Fiscal Eletrônica) is used to indicate if there's an exception to the IPI (Imposto sobre Produtos Industrializados) tax rate for a specific product.
children.name: ex_tipi

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

The FCI Control Number is a unique identifier assigned to each import FCI (Import Content Form). It's mandatory on the corresponding NF-e (electronic invoice) to ensure compliance with Brazilian import tax regulations.
children.name: fci_num

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

RECOPI NACIONAL is a Brazilian government system that facilitates the registration and management of tax-exempt operations involving paper destined for printing books, newspapers, and periodicals (known as "papel imune" in Portuguese).
children.name: recopi_num

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

Include relevant information to display on Invoice.
children.name: additional_info

children.description:
Only for BR shop.

Required if the item is a group item.
children.name: group_item_info

children.description: Example: The package contains 6 soda cans. Whether you are selling a pack of 6 cans (fardo) or a single can (unit), enter 6.
children.name: group_qtd

children.description: Example: The package contains 6 soda cans. Whether you are selling a pack of 6 cans (fardo) or a single can (unit), enter UNI for the individual can.
children.name: group_unit

children.description: Example: The package contains 6 soda cans. Whether you are selling a pack of 6 cans (fardo) or a single can (unity), enter the value of the individual can.
children.name: group_unit_value

children.description: Example: The item is a package that contains 6 soda cans. Enter the price of the whole package.
children.name: original_group_price

children.description: Example: The item is a package that contains 6 soda cans. Please inform the GTIN SSCC code for the package.
children.name: group_gtin_sscc

children.description: Example: The item is box, that contain 6 packages. Each package contains 6 soda cans. Please inform the GRAI GTIN SSCC code for the Box.
children.name: group_grai_gtin_sscc

children.description:
[BR region]

7101 - for sales of self-produced goods

7102 - resale of third-party goods
children.name: export_cfop

children.description: Tax information

children.name: complaint_policy
warranty_time
children.description: Value should be in one of ONE_YEAR TWO_YEARS OVER_TWO_YEARS.

children.name: exclude_entrepreneur_warranty
children.description: Whether to exclude warranty complaints for entrepreneurs.If True means "I exclude warranty complaints for entrepreneur"

children.name: complaint_address_id
children.description: Address for complaint. Fetch available addresses using v2.logistics.get_address_list, and use address_id  returned from it.

children.name: additional_information
children.description: Additional information for warranty claim. Should be less than 1000 characters.
Complaint Policy for item. Only required for local PL sellers, ignored otherwise.

children.name: description_info
extended_description
field_list
field_type
children.description: Type of extended description field ：values: See Data Definition- description_field_type (text , image).

children.name: text
children.description: If field_type is text， text information will be set by this field.

children.name: image_info
image_id
children.description: Image id.
If field_type is image，image url will be set by this field.
Field of extended description.
If description_type is extended , Description information should be set by this field.

New description field. Only whitelist sellers can use it. If you use the field, please upload the description_type=extended otherwise api will return error. If you don't use this field, you don't need to upload the description_type or upload description_type=normal

children.name: description_type
children.description: Values: See Data Definition- description_type (normal , extended). If you want to use extended_description, this field must be inputed

children.name: seller_stock
location_id
children.description: location id

children.name: stock
children.description: stock
seller stock（Please notice that stock(including Seller Stock and Shopee Stock) should be larger than or equal to real-time reserved stock）

- GTIN is an identifier for trade items, developed by the international organization GS1.
- They have 8 to 14 digits. The most common are UPC, EAN, JAN and ISBN.
- GTIN will help boost positioning in online marketing channels like Google and Facebook.
- That incorporation with GTIN will also aid in Search and Recommendation in Shopee itself allowing buyers to have higher likelihood of finding one's listing.


Note: If you want to set “Item without GTIN”, please pass the gtin_code as "00".

The validation rule is based on the value return in gtin_validation_rule" field in v2.product.get_item_limit API

- Mandatory: This field is required and must contain a correctly formatted GTiN number.

- Flexible: This field is required and must contain either a correctly formatted GTlN number or "00" to declare that the item/model has no valid GTlN.
- Optional: This field is optional and can contain a correctly formatted GTiN number, "00" or be omitted entirely.
children.name: gtin_code

children.description: category recommendation service id
children.name: ds_cat_rcmd_id

children.description:
Promotion Image
Currently only allow one promoton image
You could set promotion image only if the product images' ratio is 3:4

children.description: ID of the brand.

children.description:
Scheduled publish time of this item: 

1) Can only set scheduled_publish_time for item with UNLIST status

2) Can only set the time from current time +1hour to current time +90days, and the time is only allowed to be accurate to the minute
children.name: scheduled_publish_time

children.description: ID of authorised reseller brand.
children.name: authorised_brand_id

children.description:
ID of size chart image. If you want to remove the image size chart of the item, please pass the "size_chart" empty. 


You only need to fill out either the image or template. If both are filled, only the template will be kept.


Notes: Both CB shops and local shops are supported to set "size_chart".
children.name: size_chart

children.description:
ID of template size chart. If you want to remove the template size chart of the item, please pass the "size_chart_id" as 0. 


You only need to fill out either the image or template. If both are filled, only the template will be kept.


Notes: Only local shops are supported to set "size_chart_id", for CB shops please use "size_chart".
children.name: size_chart_id
